recoveryTargets.rationale: Source-controlled draft content and application state should be reproducible without accepting source-record loss; a four-hour manual recovery objective is appropriate before monitored automation is proven.

emergencyStop: Revoke the active action approval, stop connector execution, preserve non-secret evidence, and roll back to the last recorded known-good staging/source version. No live containment action may expand beyond the incident approval.
